message:
fix: correct WebSocket disconnect message and defer analytics success until result (#5511, #5510) (#5516)

- Replace hardcoded "Install the console locally" disconnect message with
  the actual agent WebSocket URL from config, making it topology-aware
  for deployed/remote-agent setups (#5511)
- Remove premature emitMissionCompleted call from stream-done handler;
  analytics success now only fires when the authoritative backend result
  message arrives, preventing false positive completions (#5510)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
